---
title: "parser.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/parser.ts"
loc: 46
complexity: 7
logic_score: 7.40
style_score: 3.86
intel_score: 8.09
overall_score: 5.70
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 19 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://web-tree-sitter)
- [*](file://path)
- [registry](file://./pathRegistry.ts)

### Exports
- `TreeSitter`
- `isInitialized`
- `parsers`
- `initParsers`
- `initParsers`
- `getParser`
- `getParser`
- `ext`
- `langPath`
- `languageName`
- `currentDir`
- `projectRoot`
- `fullWasmPath`
- `lang`
- `parser`
- `parseCode`
- `parseCode`
- `getParser`
